summary:
Fixed. The issue was that `InstallSnapshot` did not update `commitIndex`, causing `Restart()` to set `lastApplied` to 0 instead of the snapshot boundary (10). This made the node replay entries 1-10 after restart, duplicating state machine transitions.

The fix: update `commitIndex` to match the snapshot's `lastIncludedIndex` in `snapshot.go:54-57`.
